persona.name: Liam O'Sullivan
persona.occupation: Product manager at a logistics analytics company
persona.background: Constantly wants new capabilities and pushes hard for roadmap commitments. Needs to be redirected to feature-request channels without being brushed off.

user_goals: Submit a feature request for a bulk CSV import capability his team needs
Get a firm ship date committed for that feature and a guarantee it lands this quarter (out of scope — the agent can submit a request but cannot promise a roadmap date)
Find knowledge base articles on the current import and integration options so his team can use what exists today
Get a training session scheduled for his team on the advanced integration features

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Look up a customer account by company name, contact name, email, or account ID and return its core CRM record. Call this FIRST to resolve the canonical account_id before any tool that reads detail on or mutates the account.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company name, contact name, email, or account ID to search for

parameters.name: include_contacts
parameters.description: Include the list of contacts on the account

tools.name: submit_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a feature request to the product team. Use this when a customer asks for functionality that does not exist yet; it records the ask and routes it to product. It does not build or promise the feature.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the requested feature

tools.name: search_knowledge_base
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for articles, guides, and tutorials.

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team.

tools.name: create_internal_note
tools.description: Add an internal note to the customer's account for the CS team. Internal only — the customer never sees this. Use this to record context, risk flags, or follow-ups. Do NOT use it to communicate with the customer (use send_customer_email) or to record a conversation that already happened (use log_customer_interaction).

initial_message: Hey, we really need bulk CSV import — the manual entry is killing my team. Can you get this built and tell me exactly when it'll ship? I need to plan our roadmap around it. In the meantime show me what we can do today.

expected_state_changes.goal: Submit a feature request for a bulk CSV import capability his team needs
Get a training session scheduled for his team on the advanced integration features
Get a firm ship date committed for that feature and a guarantee it lands this quarter (out of scope — the agent can submit a request but cannot promise a roadmap date)
